---
title: "About"
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image: assets/profile.png
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: rss
      text: RSS
      href: https://ggilles.dev/blog.xml
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/guillaumegilles
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/guillaumegilles
    - icon: box-fill
      text: HackTheBox
      href: https://app.hackthebox.com/profile/2425807
    - icon: shield-lock
      text: TryHackMe
      href: https://tryhackme.com/p/skekCoon
page-layout: full
---

<!-- GFM header: only visible in the GitHub profile README -->

::: {.content-visible when-format="markdown"}

<!-- ⚠️ AUTO-GENERATED from ggilles.dev — do not edit directly. -->
<!-- Source: https://github.com/guillaumegilles/guillaumegilles.github.io -->

<div align="center">

<img src="https://ggilles.dev/assets/profile.png" width="150" alt="Guillaume Gilles" style="border-radius: 50%;" />

### Guillaume Gilles

**From finance to firewalls — bringing analytical rigor to cybersecurity.**

[![Website](https://img.shields.io/badge/🌐_Website-ggilles.dev-0969da)](https://ggilles.dev)
[![RSS](https://img.shields.io/badge/RSS-Feed-FFA500?logo=rss&logoColor=fff)](https://ggilles.dev/blog.xml)
[![LinkedIn](https://img.shields.io/badge/LinkedIn-guillaumegilles-0A66C2?logo=linkedin&logoColor=fff)](https://www.linkedin.com/in/guillaumegilles)
[![HackTheBox](https://img.shields.io/badge/HackTheBox-Profile-9FEF00?logo=hackthebox&logoColor=fff)](https://app.hackthebox.com/profile/2425807)
[![TryHackMe](https://img.shields.io/badge/TryHackMe-skekCoon-C11111?logo=tryhackme&logoColor=fff)](https://tryhackme.com/p/skekCoon)

</div>

---

:::

<!-- HTML hero: only visible on the Quarto website -->

::: {.content-visible when-format="html"}

::: {#hero-heading}

# From finance to firewalls — bringing analytical rigor to cybersecurity.

> A former Banque de France analyst turned cybersecurity practitioner,
> with a decade of risk assessment and teaching experience.

For over ten years at the **Banque de France**, I decoded macroeconomic
patterns, assessed corporate resilience, and produced strategic insight
for decision-makers. In parallel, I taught statistics, financial
analysis, and information systems at top business schools — instilling
the kind of analytical rigor that translates directly into security
thinking.

:::

## 🌐 Online Profiles

I'm actively building my cybersecurity skills across several platforms —
follow my progress or challenge me!

::::: {.columns}
:::: {.column width="50%"}
### [<i class="bi bi-box-fill"></i> HackTheBox](https://app.hackthebox.com/profile/2425807)

Penetration testing labs, CTF challenges, and real-world attack
simulations. Ranking up one box at a time.
::::

:::: {.column width="50%"}
### [<i class="bi bi-shield-lock"></i> TryHackMe](https://tryhackme.com/p/skekCoon)

Guided learning paths in cyber defense, digital forensics, and offensive
security fundamentals.

<iframe src="https://tryhackme.com/api/v2/badges/public-profile?userPublicId=7028520" style='border:none;' title="TryHackMe badge"></iframe>
::::
:::::

::: {.callout-tip appearance="simple"}
## 💜 Support my work

If you find my resources helpful or enjoy my open-source contributions,
consider [sponsoring me on GitHub](https://github.com/sponsors/guillaumegilles).

<iframe src="https://github.com/sponsors/guillaumegilles/button" title="Sponsor guillaumegilles" height="32" width="114" style="border: 0; border-radius: 6px;"></iframe>
:::

:::

<!-- GFM intro: only visible in the GitHub profile README -->

::: {.content-visible when-format="markdown"}

> A former Banque de France analyst turned cybersecurity practitioner,
> with a decade of risk assessment and teaching experience.

For over ten years at the **Banque de France**, I decoded macroeconomic
patterns, assessed corporate resilience, and produced strategic insight
for decision-makers. In parallel, I taught statistics, financial
analysis, and information systems at top business schools — instilling
the kind of analytical rigor that translates directly into security
thinking.

## 🌐 Online Profiles

| Platform | Profile | Focus |
|----------|---------|-------|
| 🟢 **HackTheBox** | [skekCoon](https://app.hackthebox.com/profile/2425807) | Penetration testing labs, CTF challenges |
| 🔵 **TryHackMe** | [skekCoon](https://tryhackme.com/p/skekCoon) | Cyber defense, digital forensics |

:::

<!-- Shared content: visible in both HTML and GFM -->

Today, I'm immersed in **cybersecurity**: ranking up on
[HackTheBox](https://app.hackthebox.com/profile/2425807), learning
penetration testing, and exploring digital forensics, secure network
design, and incident investigation. My passion lies at the nexus of
data, security safeguards, and the human behaviors that drive error.

Let's connect — I'm open to cybersecurity collaborations, open-source
contributions, and conversations about economics or data science.

⚡ **Fun fact:** *"skekCoon" is a mix of
[Skeksis](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Skeksis) (from The Dark
Crystal) and my best friend — a
[Maine Coon](https://fr.wikipedia.org/wiki/Maine_coon).*

## 🛠️ Tech Stack

<p align="center">
  <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Python-3776AB?logo=python&logoColor=fff" />
  <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/R-%23276DC3.svg?logo=r&logoColor=white" />
  <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Bash-4EAA25?logo=gnubash&logoColor=fff" />
  <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Git-F05032?logo=git&logoColor=fff" />
  <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Neovim-57A143?logo=neovim&logoColor=fff" />
  <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Kali%20Linux-557C94?logo=kalilinux&logoColor=fff" />
  <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Wireshark-1679A7?logo=wireshark&logoColor=fff" />
  <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Burp%20Suite-FF6633?logo=portswigger&logoColor=fff" />
  <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Nmap-4682B4?logoColor=fff" />
  <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Metasploit-2596CD?logo=metasploit&logoColor=fff" />
  <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Markdown-%23000000.svg?logo=markdown&logoColor=white" />
</p>

## 💼 Experience

- **Banque de France** — Financial Analyst (10+ years)
  Macroeconomic analysis, corporate resilience assessment, and strategic
  reporting for decision-makers.
- **Adjunct Lecturer** — Business Schools
  Taught statistics, financial analysis, and information systems at top
  French *grandes écoles*.

## 🎓 Education & Certifications

- **2023**: [Data Scientist @ ENSAE](https://www.lecepe.fr/certificats/data-scientist/)
- **2016**: [Senior Financial Analyst @ ESSEC](https://www.essec.edu/en/pages/custom-programs/)

<!-- GFM footer: sponsor link for GitHub profile -->

::: {.content-visible when-format="markdown"}

---

<div align="center">

💜 If you enjoy my work, consider
[sponsoring me on GitHub](https://github.com/sponsors/guillaumegilles)!

</div>

:::
